<!-- ROW IF : THE CONTENT -->
          
    <p>Have you ever dreamed of <strong>flying like a superhero</strong>? Now you can! From children to seniors <strong>everybody can fly</strong> in a Wind Tunnel. <b>Make</b> your <a href="https://www.indoorskydiving.world/first-flight/" target="_blank">first flight</a> and try this <strong>incredible new experience</strong> or discover <strong>bodyflight</strong> as an exciting new <a href="https://www.indoorskydiving.world/sport/" target="_blank">sport</a>.</p>
    
        <p><strong>Sorry</strong> <strong><font color="#ff0200">it's not possible to book your flight here</font></strong> because the Wind Tunnel is <strong><font color="#ff0200">Closed</font color="#ff0200"></strong>. You can try another <a href="#experiences">thrilling experience</a> nearby <strong>Appalachian Amusement Center</strong>, browse all the wind tunnels in <a href="https://www.indoorskydiving.world/country/united-states" target="_blank">United States</a>, or <a href="https://www.indoorskydiving.world/wind-tunnel-near-me/" target="_blank">Find The Nearest Wind Tunnel</a> to you.</p>
    
      
    
    
    </div> 
    </div>

    <p><strong>IndoorSkydiving.World</strong> is a separate activity from <strong>Appalachian Amusement Center</strong>. If you wish to <strong>suggest an edit</strong> or <strong>submit a new tunnel</strong> please <a href="https://www.indoorskydiving.world/contact-us/">contact us</a>.</p>

<!-- FIND OUT MORE / CONTENT - ROW START -->
<div class="mh-row clearfix">
    <div class="mh-col-1-1 entry-content">
              
    
        <div class="su-accordion su-u-trim">
        <div class="su-spoiler su-spoiler-style-fancy su-spoiler-icon-plus" data-scroll-offset="0" data-anchor-in-url="no"><div class="su-spoiler-title" tabindex="0" role="button"><span class="su-spoiler-icon"></span>FIND OUT MORE</div><div class="su-spoiler-content su-u-clearfix su-u-trim"><h2>WHAT IS INDOOR SKYDIVING?</h2><p><strong>Indoor Skydiving</strong> is the simulation of <strong>true freefall</strong> conditions in a Vertical Wind Tunnel. It’s <strong>the dream of pure human flight</strong> that becomes a reality in a 100% <strong>safe environment</strong>. The number of Wind Tunnels around the world is growing every day.</p>
    <h2>AN EXCITING ACTIVITY FOR ALL AGES</h2>
    <p>From children to seniors <a href="https://www.indoorskydiving.world/first-flight/">everybody can fly</a>, just for <strong>fun</strong> or to start bodyflight as an exciting new <strong>sport</strong>. Most of the wind tunnels around the world are located near beautiful cities and surrounded by amenities, shopping centres and <a href="#experiences">thrilling experiences</a>. A day spent at the wind tunnel is always <strong>a day full of enjoyment for you and your family</strong>.</p>
    <h2>A BRIEF HISTORY OF INDOOR SKYDIVING</h2>
    <p>The <strong>Indoor Skydiving community</strong> has grown notably since its origins in the early 1980’s. In those times a few aircraft-propeller-driven machines around the world provided the opportunity for eager skydivers to <strong>improve their skills in the wind</strong>. A new chapter for Indoor Skydiving was written in 1998 with the opening of Skyventure Orlando. Due to the introduction of an enclosed 12-foot diameter flight chamber with smooth wall-to-wall airflow flyers could experience <strong>a more accurate representation of freefall</strong>.</p>
    <p>Initially wind tunnel training focused on belly-flying but rapidly grew into advancing more <strong>bodyflight techniques</strong>. Fast forward to the recent years, <strong>the sport has seen amazing growth</strong>! With official FAI recognition, <strong>the creation of new disciplines</strong> and an ever <a href="https://www.facebook.com/groups/indoorskydivingworld/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">expandin<code></code>g community</a> the future of Indoor Skydiving looks bright!</p>
    <h2>THE SPORT OF INDOOR SKYDIVING</h2>
    <p>The invention of modern wind tunnels has given skydivers a consistent and practical way to develop and hone skills that usually require jumping from a plane. Additionally, the increase in availability of wind tunnels has created <strong>a whole new genre of sport.</strong>Certainly <strong>bodyflight</strong> is <a href="https://www.indoorskydiving.world/sport/">one of the most exciting and fastest growing sports in the world</a>.</p></div></div>
        </div>    </div>
</div>

<!-- FIND OUT MORE / CONTENT - ROW END -->
